# Phase 2 SQL Validation Results\n\n_Automatically generated by Python BigQuery client._\n\n> **Note**: For Q9, Q10, and Q11, the variable `DATE_CODE` was set to `LATER`. You should edit the script and insert your actual `DATE_CODE` once you test the UI upload!\n\n## Q1.1: View Existence and Grain Check\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  COUNT(*)                AS total_rows,
  COUNT(DISTINCT BOM_UPDATE) AS distinct_boms,
  COUNTIF(ROW_GRAIN = 'BOM_AGG')      AS grain_tagged_rows,
  COUNTIF(SOURCE_VIEW = 'Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW') AS source_tagged_rows
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`\n```\n\n**Result:**\n\n|   total_rows |   distinct_boms |   grain_tagged_rows |   source_tagged_rows |
|-------------:|----------------:|--------------------:|---------------------:|
|          357 |             357 |                 357 |                  357 |\n\n## Q2.1: JSON Integrity - Delivery Date Missing Check\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  BOM_UPDATE,
  VPO_COUNT,
  VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`
WHERE VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON NOT LIKE '%delivery_date%'
LIMIT 10\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q2.2: JSON Integrity - Element Count vs Pipe Count\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  BOM_UPDATE,
  ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON)) AS json_count,
  (LENGTH(VPO_AGG) - LENGTH(REPLACE(VPO_AGG, '|', '')) + 1)   AS pipe_count,
  VPO_COUNT                                                      AS vpo_count_col
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`
WHERE
    ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON))
  != (LENGTH(VPO_AGG) - LENGTH(REPLACE(VPO_AGG, '|', '')) + 1)
LIMIT 10\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q2.3: JSON vs DRAFT_PR_ID Pipe Count\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  BOM_UPDATE,
  ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON)) AS json_count,
  (LENGTH(DRAFT_PR_ID_AGG) - LENGTH(REPLACE(DRAFT_PR_ID_AGG, '|', '')) + 1) AS pr_pipe_count
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`
WHERE
    ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON))
  != (LENGTH(DRAFT_PR_ID_AGG) - LENGTH(REPLACE(DRAFT_PR_ID_AGG, '|', '')) + 1)
LIMIT 10\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q3.1: Shortage Aggregation Accuracy\n\n```sql\nWITH direct_sum AS (
  SELECT
    BOM_UPDATE,
    SUM(GREATEST(0, NET_SHORTAGE_QTY)) AS manual_agg
  FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Draft`
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(FULFILLMENT_MODE)) = 'public'
  GROUP BY BOM_UPDATE
)
SELECT
  v.BOM_UPDATE,
  v.NET_SHORTAGE_QTY_AGG       AS view_agg,
  d.manual_agg                 AS expected_agg,
  v.NET_SHORTAGE_QTY_AGG - d.manual_agg AS delta
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW` v
JOIN direct_sum d USING (BOM_UPDATE)
WHERE ABS(v.NET_SHORTAGE_QTY_AGG - d.manual_agg) > 0.001
ORDER BY ABS(delta) DESC
LIMIT 20\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q4.1: BOM_Shortage_Backup_VIEW Scope Fix Check\n\n```sql\nWITH public_demand AS (
  SELECT BOM_UPDATE, SUM(GROSS_DEMAND_QTY) AS public_total
  FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Material_Demand_VIEW`
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(FULFILLMENT_MODE)) = 'public'
  GROUP BY BOM_UPDATE
)
SELECT
  b.BOM_UPDATE,
  b.BOM_TOTAL_DEMAND      AS backup_demand,
  COALESCE(p.public_total, 0) AS public_demand_direct,
  b.BOM_TOTAL_DEMAND - COALESCE(p.public_total, 0) AS delta
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.BOM_Shortage_Backup_VIEW` b
LEFT JOIN public_demand p USING (BOM_UPDATE)
WHERE ABS(b.BOM_TOTAL_DEMAND - COALESCE(p.public_total, 0)) > 0.001
LIMIT 20\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q5.1: MISMATCH Distribution Sanity\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  BOM_SHORTAGE_STATUS,
  COUNT(*)               AS bom_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) AS pct
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`
GROUP BY BOM_SHORTAGE_STATUS\n```\n\n**Result:**\n\n| BOM_SHORTAGE_STATUS   |   bom_count |   pct |
|:----------------------|------------:|------:|
| MISMATCH              |          41 | 11.50 |
| OK                    |         316 | 88.50 |\n\n## Q5.2: Inspect worst MISMATCH rows\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  BOM_UPDATE,
  NET_SHORTAGE_QTY_AGG,
  BOM_TOTAL_SHORTAGE,
  BOM_SHORTAGE_DIFF,
  ABS(BOM_SHORTAGE_DIFF) AS abs_diff,
  ROUND(ABS(BOM_SHORTAGE_DIFF) / GREATEST(BOM_TOTAL_SHORTAGE, 0.001) * 100, 1) AS pct_diff,
  VPO_COUNT
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`
WHERE BOM_SHORTAGE_STATUS = 'MISMATCH'
ORDER BY ABS(BOM_SHORTAGE_DIFF) DESC
LIMIT 20\n```\n\n**Result:**\n\n|   BOM_UPDATE |   NET_SHORTAGE_QTY_AGG |   BOM_TOTAL_SHORTAGE |   BOM_SHORTAGE_DIFF |   abs_diff |   pct_diff |   VPO_COUNT |
|-------------:|-----------------------:|---------------------:|--------------------:|-----------:|-----------:|------------:|

|    302005943 |                  10.81 |                 0.00 |               10.81 |      10.81 | 1081010.00 |           1 |\n\n## Q6.1: Delivery Date Coverage in JSON\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  BOM_UPDATE,
  JSON_VALUE(elem, '$.draft_pr_id')    AS draft_pr_id,
  JSON_VALUE(elem, '$.delivery_date')  AS delivery_date
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`,
  UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON)) AS elem
WHERE JSON_VALUE(elem, '$.delivery_date') IS NULL
   OR JSON_VALUE(elem, '$.delivery_date') = ''
LIMIT 20\n```\n\n**Result:**\n\n|   BOM_UPDATE | draft_pr_id                          | delivery_date   |

                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | PRD_f0703f0105c4ab599bcc7fd729c604df|PRD_359b9e8b9137111ce9434c9024d95710|PRD_485dbaaf288fab014dea12bfa3f6ebab|PRD_d8889bc60f8627df755f2cf156e78a21|PRD_d392a5802d23a5dd11f90d6b1811b206|PRD_0640a9094cf1193efc8db83f6dc97c30|PRD_e52529330ad793ea7ac5b4215ae4f098|PRD_c6c0f1bac4222f0edc3042593b2565d3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |\n\n## Q7.1: LRM Explode Algorithm Verification (Math Invariant Check)\n\n```sql\nWITH parameters AS (
  SELECT
    BOM_UPDATE,
    NET_SHORTAGE_QTY_AGG                           AS q_agg,
    CAST(1 AS INT64)                               AS spq,
    VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON,
    VPO_COUNT
  FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`
),
q_bom_computed AS (
  SELECT
    BOM_UPDATE,
    q_agg,
    spq,
    VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON,
    VPO_COUNT,
    CAST(CEIL((q_agg * 1.10) / spq) * spq AS INT64) AS Q_BOM
  FROM parameters
),
allocated AS (
  SELECT
    q.BOM_UPDATE,
    q.Q_BOM,
    q.VPO_COUNT,
    (SELECT SUM(CAST(FLOOR(
        GREATEST(0, CAST(JSON_VALUE(elem, '$.net_shortage_qty') AS FLOAT64))
        / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(GREATEST(0, CAST(JSON_VALUE(e2, '$.net_shortage_qty') AS FLOAT64)))
                  FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(q.VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON)) e2), 0)
        * q.Q_BOM
    ) AS INT64))
    FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(q.VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON)) elem
    WHERE GREATEST(0, CAST(JSON_VALUE(elem, '$.net_shortage_qty') AS FLOAT64)) > 0
    ) AS sum_floor,
    q.Q_BOM - (SELECT SUM(CAST(FLOOR(
        GREATEST(0, CAST(JSON_VALUE(elem, '$.net_shortage_qty') AS FLOAT64))
        / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(GREATEST(0, CAST(JSON_VALUE(e2, '$.net_shortage_qty') AS FLOAT64)))
                  FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(q.VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON)) e2), 0)
        * q.Q_BOM
    ) AS INT64))
    FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(q.VPO_COMPONENTS_JSON)) elem
    ) AS delta
  FROM q_bom_computed q
  WHERE q.Q_BOM > 0
)
SELECT
  BOM_UPDATE,
  Q_BOM,
  VPO_COUNT,
  sum_floor,
  delta,
  COALESCE(sum_floor, 0) + COALESCE(delta, 0) AS final_sum,
  (COALESCE(sum_floor, 0) + COALESCE(delta, 0)) = Q_BOM AS conservation_check
FROM allocated
ORDER BY delta DESC
LIMIT 30\n```\n\n**Result:**\n\n|   BOM_UPDATE |    Q_BOM |   VPO_COUNT |   sum_floor |   delta |   final_sum | conservation_check   |

|    330090001 |      278 |          20 |         270 |       8 |         278 | True                 |\n\n## Q8.1: SAVINGS_VS_LEGACY Sanity Check\n\n```sql\nWITH per_vpo_legacy AS (
  SELECT
    BOM_UPDATE,
    DRAFT_PR_ID,
    VPO,
    GREATEST(0, NET_SHORTAGE_QTY)                                     AS net_pos,
    1                                                                   AS spq_ref,
    CAST(CEIL(GREATEST(0, NET_SHORTAGE_QTY) * 1.10 / 1) * 1 AS INT64) AS legacy_qty_i
  FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Draft`
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(FULFILLMENT_MODE)) = 'public'
),
legacy_totals AS (
  SELECT
    BOM_UPDATE,
    SUM(legacy_qty_i)                                    AS LEGACY_TOTAL,
    SUM(GREATEST(0, net_pos))                            AS NET_AGG,
    CAST(CEIL(SUM(GREATEST(0, net_pos)) * 1.10) AS INT64) AS Q_BOM_AGG
  FROM per_vpo_legacy
  GROUP BY BOM_UPDATE
)
SELECT
  BOM_UPDATE,
  NET_AGG,
  LEGACY_TOTAL,
  Q_BOM_AGG,
  LEGACY_TOTAL - Q_BOM_AGG                AS expected_savings,
  CASE
    WHEN LEGACY_TOTAL > Q_BOM_AGG THEN '✅ SAVES'
    WHEN LEGACY_TOTAL = Q_BOM_AGG THEN '➡️ NEUTRAL'
    ELSE '⚠️ ANOMALY'
  END AS savings_verdict
FROM legacy_totals
ORDER BY expected_savings DESC
LIMIT 30\n```\n\n**Result:**\n\n|   BOM_UPDATE |     NET_AGG |   LEGACY_TOTAL |   Q_BOM_AGG |   expected_savings | savings_verdict   |

|    306001310 |  6786212.59 |        7464842 |     7464834 |                  8 | ✅ SAVES           |\n\n## Q9.1: PR_Staging uploaded conservation check\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  BOM_UPDATE,
  COUNT(DISTINCT VPO)                AS vpo_count,
  SUM(QTY_TO_APPROVE)               AS sum_qi,
  FULFILLMENT_MODE,
  DATE_CODE,
  UPDATED_BY,
  MAX(UPDATED_AT)                    AS latest_update
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Staging`
WHERE FULFILLMENT_MODE = 'PUBLIC'
  AND DATE_CODE = 'LATER'   
GROUP BY BOM_UPDATE, FULFILLMENT_MODE, DATE_CODE, UPDATED_BY
ORDER BY BOM_UPDATE
LIMIT 20\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q9.2: All exploded allocations non-negative\n\n```sql\nSELECT *
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Staging`
WHERE FULFILLMENT_MODE = 'PUBLIC'
  AND QTY_TO_APPROVE < 0
  AND DATE_CODE = 'LATER'\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q9.3: PR_Staging delivery date matching check\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  s.PR_STAGING_ID,
  s.VPO,
  s.BOM_UPDATE,
  s.REQUESTED_DELIVERY_DATE,
  pr.REQUESTED_DELIVERY_DATE AS original_vpo_delivery_date,
  s.REQUESTED_DELIVERY_DATE = pr.REQUESTED_DELIVERY_DATE AS dates_match
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Staging` s
JOIN `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Draft`   pr
  ON s.PR_STAGING_ID = pr.DRAFT_PR_ID
WHERE s.FULFILLMENT_MODE = 'PUBLIC'
  AND s.DATE_CODE = 'LATER'
  AND s.REQUESTED_DELIVERY_DATE != pr.REQUESTED_DELIVERY_DATE
LIMIT 20\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q9.4: PR_Staging rows match VPO Count\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  stg.BOM_UPDATE,
  COUNT(DISTINCT stg.VPO)   AS staged_vpos,
  view.VPO_COUNT            AS expected_vpos
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Staging` stg
JOIN `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW` view
  USING (BOM_UPDATE)
WHERE stg.FULFILLMENT_MODE = 'PUBLIC'
  AND stg.DATE_CODE = 'LATER'
GROUP BY stg.BOM_UPDATE, view.VPO_COUNT
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT stg.VPO) != view.VPO_COUNT\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q10.1: PR_Final mapped properly via SP\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  stg.BOM_UPDATE,
  stg.VPO,
  stg.QTY_TO_APPROVE,
  prf.QTY_APPROVED AS final_qty,
  prf.CONSOLIDATION_STATUS,
  prf.UPDATED_AT AS final_updated_at
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Staging` stg
LEFT JOIN `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Final` prf
  ON stg.BOM_UPDATE = prf.BOM_UPDATE
  AND stg.VPO = prf.VPO
WHERE stg.FULFILLMENT_MODE = 'PUBLIC'
  AND stg.DATE_CODE = 'LATER'
ORDER BY stg.BOM_UPDATE, stg.VPO
LIMIT 20\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q10.2: Orphaned staging rows check\n\n```sql\nSELECT COUNT(*) AS orphaned_staging_rows
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Staging`
WHERE FULFILLMENT_MODE = 'PUBLIC'
  AND VALIDATION_STATUS = 'PENDING'
  AND UPDATED_AT < TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)\n```\n\n**Result:**\n\n|   orphaned_staging_rows |
|------------------------:|
|                    0.00 |\n\n## Q11.1: Legacy regression guard\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  FULFILLMENT_MODE,
  COUNT(*)                           AS staging_rows,
  COUNT(DISTINCT VPO)                AS distinct_vpos,
  COUNT(*) = COUNT(DISTINCT VPO)     AS is_one_to_one
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Staging`
WHERE FULFILLMENT_MODE = 'PRIVATE'
  AND UPDATED_AT >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
GROUP BY FULFILLMENT_MODE\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q12.1: SUPPLIER_CONSISTENCY_CHECK Flag\n\n```sql\nSELECT
  BOM_UPDATE,
  SUPPLIER_CONSISTENCY_CHECK,
  ASSIGNED_SUPPLIER_NAME,
  VPO_COUNT
FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`
WHERE SUPPLIER_CONSISTENCY_CHECK > 1
ORDER BY SUPPLIER_CONSISTENCY_CHECK DESC
LIMIT 20\n```\n\n**Result:** 0 rows (No data to display)\n\n## Q13.1: End-to-End Rounding Efficiency Proof\n\n```sql\nWITH legacy_per_vpo AS (
  SELECT
    BOM_UPDATE,
    SUM(CAST(CEIL(GREATEST(0, NET_SHORTAGE_QTY) * 1.10) AS INT64)) AS legacy_total_order
  FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.PR_Draft`
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(FULFILLMENT_MODE)) = 'public'
  GROUP BY BOM_UPDATE
),
agg_order AS (
  SELECT
    BOM_UPDATE,
    NET_SHORTAGE_QTY_AGG,
    CAST(CEIL(NET_SHORTAGE_QTY_AGG * 1.10) AS INT64) AS agg_total_order
  FROM `boxwood-charmer-473204-k8.isc_scm_ops.Sourcing_Feed_Aggregated_VIEW`
)
SELECT
  a.BOM_UPDATE,
  l.legacy_total_order,
  a.agg_total_order,
  l.legacy_total_order - a.agg_total_order  AS units_saved,
  ROUND((l.legacy_total_order - a.agg_total_order) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(l.legacy_total_order, 0), 1)   AS pct_reduction
FROM agg_order a
JOIN legacy_per_vpo l USING (BOM_UPDATE)
WHERE l.legacy_total_order > a.agg_total_order
ORDER BY units_saved DESC
LIMIT 30\n```\n\n**Result:**\n\n|   BOM_UPDATE |   legacy_total_order |   agg_total_order |   units_saved |   pct_reduction |
